_comment: Synthetic HDFC Bank savings/current DETAILED-layout golden vector (no real data). Ported from the web engine's hdfc_bank.py (BalanceLedgerStatementReader); values captured from a live run of the web reader + balance_chain.check (RECONCILED). Detailed layout: DD/MM/YYYY dates with explicit Withdrawals and Deposits columns (the empty side prints 0.00) then the closing balance; an inline 'Opening Balance :'. The non-zero column is the transaction amount; direction comes from the running-balance delta.
lines: Txn Date Narration Withdrawals Deposits Closing Balance
full_text:
